name: provenance manifest compliance_state carries a controls_consulted array and a legal_review_status_for_consulted array
command: printf '{"compliance_state":{"nist-csf-2":{"controls_consulted":["GV.OC"],"fetched_at":"t","edition":"2.0","freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency","legal_review_status_for_consulted":["pending"]}}}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json --check compliance 2>out.txt && grep -q 'controls_consulted_count=1' out.txt && grep -q 'legal_review_status_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
